hooks.prompt: A file was just written or edited. Act as the design-decision-tracker agent. First read .claude/skills/design-decision-tracker/SKILL.md. Then read control/config/agent-config.json to get current_case. Then list the files in cases/{current_case}/ to find recently modified files and read them. Analyze the content for design decisions — choices about structure, layout, data model, libraries, interaction patterns, visual style, or technical architecture. Every non-trivial choice counts. Append your findings as MDRs to cases/{current_case}/decisions.md. Never overwrite existing entries. If the modified file is clearly not in the active case folder, do nothing.
